The Haven difference

The Haven difference for cabin owners

You bought your cabin to build wealth and to enjoy the mountains, not to spend your weekends answering guest messages, chasing cleaners, and second-guessing your nightly rate. That is the job we take off your plate. Haven is a local, full-service vacation rental management company based right here in Sevier County. When something needs a person on-site, we are minutes from your door, not three time zones away in a national call center.

What sets us apart starts with how we charge. You pay one simple flat fee. There are no hidden booking fees, no markups on cleaning, and no nickel-and-diming on the back end. When you read your monthly statement, the math is honest and the payout lands by direct deposit. That clarity is rare in this industry, and owners feel the difference the first time they compare a Haven statement to what they were getting before.

We also stay deliberately smaller than the big regional managers. We manage a select group of homes well rather than thousands poorly, which means your property gets the attention and the local expertise a high-volume operator simply cannot give it. That focus is exactly why Haven cabins tend to run ahead of the market on both occupancy and revenue.

Locally owned and operated
About us

Owning a profitable vacation rental should be easy

Most vacation rentals never live up to their potential. They are underbooked, take too much time to manage, or just cause too many headaches. Sometimes even the property management companies that promise to make you more profitable end up charging so much that you lose the additional profit they helped create.

At Haven Vacation Rentals, we believe making passive income from vacation rentals should feel a lot more passive. As property owners ourselves, we know how important it is for each property to earn as much as it possibly can without taking up a bunch of your time.

Run it like we own it.Keep costs low. Fix issues fast. Book it full.
Wow our guests.Anticipate their needs. Communicate clearly. Make them want to come back.
Full-service management

We handle everything. You earn more.

One flat fee covers the entire operation. From listing and pricing to cleaning, guest care, and maintenance, we run the day-to-day so you do not have to. Everything below is included, not an add-on that shows up later as a surprise line item.

Bookings & calendar

We list, sync, and optimize your calendar across Airbnb, Vrbo, Booking.com, and direct, so every open night works hard.

Smart human pricing

A real revenue manager who knows this market adjusts your rates daily around demand, events, and seasonality.

Marketing & listings

Professional photography, written-to-convert listings, and multi-channel distribution that puts your cabin in front of more guests.

Housekeeping & turnovers

Vetted local cleaners, hotel-grade standards, and inspected turnovers between every stay.

24/7 guest communication

We answer guests fast, day or night, so small questions never become bad reviews.

Maintenance & contractors

We coordinate trusted local trades and handle issues before they reach you or your guests.

Direct deposit payouts

Clean monthly owner statements and reliable direct-deposit payouts. No surprises, no nickel-and-diming.

Reviews & reputation

A guest-obsessed experience that earns the five-star reviews that drive future bookings and revenue.

How it works

Hassle-free from day one

You hand us the keys. We run the day-to-day operation and the income lands in your account.

1

We rent it out

Professional listings and marketing across Airbnb, Vrbo, Booking.com, and direct.

2

We manage it

Inspected turnovers, trusted local maintenance, and smart human pricing every day.

3

We wow guests

24/7 communication and five-star care that earns reviews, rebookings, and referrals.

4

You get paid

Clean monthly statements and direct-deposit payouts. The math is always honest.

By the numbers

+30%Revenue ahead of the market

Top 1%Of Airbnb listings worldwide
Why owners switch

Why local, flat-fee, guest-obsessed management nets you more

Revenue is not set by an algorithm guessing from a distance. A real revenue manager who knows this market adjusts your rates around local demand, events, holidays, and the rhythm of the seasons. That human judgment, paired with daily attention, helps Haven owners run roughly 30 percent ahead of the market on revenue. Those are gross numbers, but the flat fee is what protects your net. When a manager pads cleaning fees or skims booking charges, the gap between what your cabin earns and what you keep quietly widens. With one transparent fee, that gap stays small and predictable.

The other half of the equation is the guest. We are guest-obsessed because a five-star guest experience is the engine of profit, not a soft nicety. Fast 24/7 communication, inspected turnovers, and trusted local maintenance keep guests happy, and happy guests leave five-star reviews, rebook, and refer their friends. Haven listings have earned 4.9 stars across 4,000+ Google reviews and rank in the top 1, 5, and 10 percent of Airbnb listings worldwide. Strong reviews lift your search ranking, which lifts your occupancy and your rate, which compounds back into revenue month after month.

This matters more in 2026 than it did a few years ago. Smoky Mountain supply growth has cooled to about 1 percent year over year, down from roughly 8 percent the year before, while the average nightly rate sits near $321 and is holding steady. A rising tide is no longer lifting every cabin. This is a market that rewards operational excellence, sharp pricing, and a team that knows the area, which is precisely the kind of management Haven was built to deliver.

01

A local team

We are based right here in the Smoky Mountains, not in a call center three time zones away. When something needs a person on-site, we are minutes from your door.

02

Smart human pricing

A real revenue manager who knows this market sets your rates, not just an algorithm guessing from afar. That is how Haven owners run ahead of the market.

03

Guest-obsessed

A five-star guest experience is the engine of profit. Happy guests leave five-star reviews, rebook, and refer, which lifts your ranking and your rate.

Capability Self-managing National manager Haven

Time you spend each weekAll of itSomeAlmost none
Revenue vs. the marketAt or belowAbout market~30% ahead
Where we manage

Four Smoky Mountain markets

Each market has its own rules, demand patterns, and guest profile. We have a dedicated page for every one.

Gatlinburg

In-town walkability and the zoning angle that protects rentals.

Explore

Pigeon Forge

High demand, occupancy caps, and grandfathering you need to know.

Explore

Sevierville

The emerging value market with room to run on revenue.

Explore

Wears Valley

County rules, the Three Strikes policy, and an uncontested gap.

Explore
Questions

What owners ask first

Haven works on one simple flat management fee. There are no hidden booking fees, no markups on cleaning, and no extra charges buried in your monthly statement. You always know exactly what you pay and exactly what you earn. The best way to see the specific numbers for your cabin is to book a call, where we can walk through your property and your market together.

We manage cabins and vacation rentals across Sevier County, including Gatlinburg, Pigeon Forge, Sevierville, and Wears Valley. Because we are based locally, our team can be on-site quickly when a home needs hands-on attention. Each market has its own rules, demand patterns, and guest profile, and we have a dedicated page for each one so you can see how we approach your specific area.

Everything is included for the one flat fee: bookings and calendar management across Airbnb, Vrbo, Booking.com, and direct; smart human revenue pricing; professional marketing and listings; housekeeping with inspected turnovers; 24/7 guest communication; maintenance through trusted local contractors; clean monthly statements with direct-deposit payouts; and active management of your reviews and reputation. You hand us the keys and we run the day-to-day operation.

Haven-managed homes run roughly 30 percent ahead of the market on revenue. Your specific potential depends on your cabin's location, size, condition, and amenities. During our evaluation we look at your property and comparable rentals in your market, then show you what it can realistically earn under professional management before you commit to anything.

Both, with the person in charge. We use pricing tools as inputs, but a real revenue manager who knows this market sets and adjusts your rates around local demand, events, and seasonality. An algorithm alone cannot tell that a specific weekend will spike because of a local event, or that a slow stretch needs a smart adjustment to stay booked. Human judgment on top of good data is how our owners stay ahead of the market.

The process is straightforward. First, we evaluate your property and your market and show you the numbers. Second, we recommend the profitable improvements that lift your listing and your rate. Third, we take over the day-to-day and you start earning more while we handle bookings, pricing, guests, cleaning, and maintenance. It begins with a single, no-pressure call about your property.

Let's talk about what your cabin could earn

Make your passive income more passive, with more income

If you are ready for a local team that charges one honest fee, prices your home like a professional, and treats your guests like the asset they are, we should talk. There is no pressure and no obligation. We will look at your property and your market together, share what we see, and let the numbers speak for themselves. Book a call about your property and find out what management built for the 2026 Smoky Mountain market can do for you.
